feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Renaming Non-Stock BOM Components in Sales BOM (Usage:5) – Text Fields Not Propagating to Orders
entry.content: In the SD module, we use BOM Update (Version 2) to maintain set products with BOM Usage: 5 (Sales Management). There’s a requirement to modify the component names of non-stock items within the BOM structure. (Example: A component is normally named "Hose A" in the master data but needs to display as "Hose B" within the set product.) We noticed the BOM details include fields like "Detail Text" (明細テキスト) and "Detail Text 2" (明細テキスト2). However, even after populating these fields, sales orders still show the original material name. Questions: 1.Are these text fields incompatible with BOM Usage 5 (Sales Management)? 2.Is there an additional configuration needed to ensure the custom names appear in sales documents?

entry.title: How to call a API in BADI implementation in HANA Cloud Public edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We need to check if we can call Supplier confirmation API in a BADI implementation. We need to read the supplier confirmation data in the implemented BADI while Workflow triggers.

If possible, Kindly provide the sample code if any.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Purchase Order Adobe Form
entry.content:
Dear All

We have a requirement to show Tax details by using Tax Code available at line item within Purchase Order but Tax Code is not mapped within Odata Services used in Adobe Form.

FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_GLO_MENA_SRV
FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_SRV

Any idea how to include remaining standard fields within standard Odata Services or any option to create a custom Odata Service by copying the standard one.

entry.title: Issue while configuring the API Finance - Cash Management Outbound Integration (SAP_COM_0285)
entry.content:
How to define Main Filters for Cash Flow Replication


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: In SAP Public Cloud, how to update the currency for cost and budget, which currency should be used?
entry.content:
Dear Community,
In the Import Financial Plan Data app when I want to upload a budget or plant cost using two different currencies eg.: CHF-EUR, the exchange rate is wrong (we get 3500 CHF/3021,57 EUR, that should be 3668,35 EUR)
I tried to modify the exchange rate in the Import foreign rates  app to update the exchange rates, however, this modifications doesn't show in the Import Financial Plan Data app, amounts remain the same.

Financial data plan app might derive the exchange rates from another table.

I also tried to modify the exchange rate type in Central Business Configuration, Maintain category for planning section, exchange rate type from P to M, however, the system doesn't let me to change it.

Any insights or suggestions from your experiences would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Sales rebate processing - condition contract pricing
entry.content:
Hi all,

we need to have additional condition types in sales condition contracts, so those were created and customized but they are not visible when creating a condition contract. 

The pricing procedure is customized and also assigned to sales contract type 0S01, the condition table only contains the field "condition contract number" so there is no link to the condition types. Why are the new condition types not available when creating a condition contract?

Thanks and best regards

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud -Master Form Template changes not showing up in the related Content Forms
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (TEST) - The updates and changes I've made in my Master Form Templates continuously are not showing up in the related content forms. 

 

For example, our company created a customer master form during original implementation that had no footer. No this is something we very much want to utilize. I identified the correct master form, downloaded it, updated it in Adobe LiveCycle, uploaded it. My assumption is now when I download the related content form it should should display this footer but it doesn't. Am i missing something? perhaps there is an additional step?

Similarly, we don't want any "Test Copy" watermarks in any of our forms in any situation. So I updated several master forms to delete the watermark object and binding. I than did the same process as above, but again none of the content forms show these changes. 

Please help! We really want to bring these changes into production. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Balance in transaction currency is too large for automatic correction
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm facing a problem with the Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous) API in an SAP Public Cloud environment. I developed it based on a community post (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/guidelines-for-api-journal-entry-clearing-asynchronous/ba-p/13410748), and I'm receiving the following error: 'Balance in transaction currency BRL 1,157.74- is too large for automatic correction.'

I've tried making various adjustments, modifying the payload, and only had success when I performed a partial clearing with 0.01 (where I believe there's some tolerance the system has when validating the balance).

Has anyone used this API or experienced a similar problem when clearing documents?

These are some links I used as references in this development:

  • Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous) Documentation
  • Guidelines for API Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous)

Best Regards,

Marcelo

entry.title: How to create down payment for service order 3D2
entry.content:
Hi,

Our clients take down payment from their customer for services. They will be using solution process 3D2 -Service Order Management and Monitoring, to process their service orders. 

We couldnt find the billing plan function in the application, nor can we find the button to enable Billing Plan like the one in Sales Order.

Header level:

Item level:

We even tried looking to use the Manage Customer Down Payment Requests but there are only options for Sales Order but not Service Order.

 

Please let us know if theres a way to post down payment for service order.

Thank you.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Edit button Disabled in Business Configuration app in TEST and PROD system
entry.content:
Hi,
As per the tutorial provided by SAP to create a Business Configuration Application on top of the custom table was created and published successfully in the Customizing and Development tenants of the 3 - System Landscape of SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.

When the create Business configuration application is opened in the Customizing / Development tenants, the Edit button is enabled and it is possible to add or delete records into the table and save them in a customizing request.

When this BC application is transported to the TEST and PROD systems by releasing the Workbench Transport from Eclipse and the Customizing Transport from the cloud the data and the table are available as expected in the TEST and PROD system.
But the Edit button is disabled in the TEST and PROD system.

As per the reference from the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-create-a-rap-bo-to-change-the-content-of-a-customizing-table-in-the/ba-p/13723087 it is clearly mentioned that the TEST and PROD systems are not made for customizing.

How can we make this edit button enabled in TEST and PROD systems? As whenever there is a change in data the user has to make changes in CUST system and capture them in a Customizing Transport and then export that transport to the next systems which in long run is not advisable.

As per the community blog mentioned above, where can we find the setting for adaptable in production to make the changes?

Regards,
Shyam Prasad.

entry.title: Unable to create Intelligent Scenarios in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
When I try to create a Intelligent Scenario in S/4 HANA Public Cloud, I am getting below error. 
Unable to edit the field.

entry.title: How to set validation in CO11N that Qty should not be Zero for Material with 261 Goods Movement ?
entry.content:
Hello All,

In SAP public cloud, during Production Order Confirmation (CO11N) - Quantity should not be "zero" in Goods movement tab for Materials with 261 Movement type.

How can this be achieved? Some Badi's have been searched for this requirement but not useful.

Let me know if anyone achieved this or can be done using "Screen Persona" Concept in public cloud,

Thankyou.

entry.title: Create Shipment VT01N tile/Business Catalogue in SAP S4H PUBLIC CLOUD edition
entry.content:
Dear SAP Guru's,

I unable to find the tile for Create Shipment VT01N. Please can you tell me where it is maintained Public Cloud 
Thanks 
Regards,

Chhatru

entry.title: In App 'my Inbox' after PO approval or rejection action BAdi is required
entry.content:
As per a requirement to fetch the field value for field PURCHASINGPROCESSINGSTATUS (Proc. State) updated in CDS: I_PURCHASEORDERAPI01 through FIORI Inbox after approval or rejection of Purchase Order by approver, we are unable to find any Business Add-In or any enhancement point for the same.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manage Purchase Requisitions filtering
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want the user to only see requests in Manage Purchase Requisitions app (F2229) opened by users in their own department.

Thanks a lot for your help

Best regards

entry.title: Unable to Retrieve Business Data in Custom Inbound API on BO – S/4HANA Cloud 2502 (RAP)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to create custom inbound API based on TUTORIAL from developers.sap.com. The problem is that i can't get data from my system on Partner Demo Customizing tenant (100) for S4H Cloud Public Edition 2502 to test it. When i try use option Data Preview i got below message. 

Additionally, when i released service binding based on CDS Projection View for I_SupplierInvoiceTP to validate it, the symptoms were the same - table was empty. ...

My activities: 

  • In my opinion i have enough business roles assigned because i have an access to Manage Sales Order application where i can search for created documents. Maybe not enough? - if so, where i can find information about necessary business roles that i need to assign to my account on S4Hana system ?

  • CDS has released contracts C1 and C0.  

  • What's more, in my Partner Demo Development tenant (080) i have an access to preview data. But it's a development system without business data so i can't test my Business Object.

Does anyone know solution that will help me to get an access to business data to test my custom inbound API based on BO ? Frankly, i am run out of concepts what i can do more... 

Best regards, AN

entry.title: GROW with SAP Learning Roadmap
entry.content: Any recommendations on a learning and certification roadmap for GROW with SAP

entry.title: Country dimension for Expense Reporting not working for Subledger and Concur
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have business requirement of reporting operating expenses by Country.

Recently, SAP has enabled new additional accounting dimensions in general ledger line items and analytical reports needed for insurance carriers: product group, branch, data source, customer country/region, customer group, customer industry.

However, there are certain limitation with the Country/Region field as listed below:

- Field country is not available for Fiori app 'Create Supplier Invoice'

- Value in country field is updated in Concur and same is getting populated in Concur payload file. However, it's not getting filled in S4 accounting document. We tried to explore Substitution rule for Concur via Fiori app 'Manage Concur Substitution Rules' to update the same in S4 accounting document, but field Country is not available in target field of substitution rule.

- Similarly, we are facing issue to update country value for Fixed Assets posting. We are unable to update it for depreciation posting. We tried to build substitution rule for Fixed Asset Posting via Fiori app 'Manage Substitution/Validation Rules for Asset Posting', but field country is not available in target field of substitution rule. 

Any inputs would be appreciated.

Regards,

Virendra Sharma

entry.title: Email Notification Issue for Rejected/Partially Rejected payment batchs.
entry.content:
How to handle rejected payments and partially rejected payments and trigger and notification to team members?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Negative value not allowed for depreciation area 93
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

our client is implementing S/4HANA cloud public edition and is in progress of manually transferring legacy fixed assets manually with app Post Transfer Values For legacy assets. The depreciation areas are: 

- Local tax in local currency (15)

- Book depreciation (32)

- Book depreciation - annual (92) 

- Depreciation difference (EVL and book deprec.) (93)

In their legacy system (ECC) they have assets with negative values in depreciation area 93. For that depreciation area there is no Additional Parameters where you could allow negative values.

Is it possible to allow negative values for depreciation area 93 in SAP S/4HANA cloud Public Edition?

If yes, how?

Thanks already in advance for your help!

-m-
